content.text:
[Sun 2026-04-19 17:08 UTC] I finished the auth flow for creator-suite. Dashboard integration is still blocked on the API schema.

Use `tools/project_state_cli.py`, `tools/commit_feed.py`, and `tools/notify_team.py` to bring creator-suite's project record up to date and let the team know.

Make sure the auth-flow completion, the move to dashboard integration, and the remaining blocker are reflected in the project record. Include one concise line of relevant recent work from the commit feed and keep it non-sensitive.

Leave every project other than `creator-suite` unchanged, and send no other notification.

arguments.command:
python tools/project_state_cli.py --help && printf '
---
' && python tools/commit_feed.py --help && printf '
---
' && python tools/notify_team.py --help

content.text:
usage: project_state_cli.py [-h]
                            {show-project,mark-task-done,set-project-status,set-current-phase,add-event}
                            ...

positional arguments:
  {show-project,mark-task-done,set-project-status,set-current-phase,add-event}

options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit

---
usage: commit_feed.py [-h] {list} ...

positional arguments:
  {list}

options:
  -h, --help  show this help message and exit

---
usage: notify_team.py [-h] {send} ...

positional arguments:
  {send}

options:
  -h, --help  show this help message and exit

arguments.command:
python tools/project_state_cli.py show-project creator-suite && printf '
---
' && python tools/commit_feed.py list --help && printf '
---
' && python tools/notify_team.py send --help

arguments.command: python tools/project_state_cli.py set-current-phase --project creator-suite --phase dashboard-integration && python tools/project_state_cli.py set-project-status --project creator-suite --status blocked && python tools/project_state_cli.py mark-task-done --project creator-suite --task auth-flow && python tools/project_state_cli.py add-event --project creator-suite --event "Auth flow completed; moving into dashboard integration; blocked on finalized API schema."

                                      --description DESCRIPTION
                                      [--context CONTEXT]

(Command exited with code 2)

arguments.command: python tools/project_state_cli.py add-event --project creator-suite --type update --description "Auth flow completed; moving into dashboard integration; blocked on finalized API schema." --context "Recent work: feat(auth): finish session refresh handling"
